source.document: FIDIC Conditions of Contract for Construction

key_duties: Give right of access to Site (2.1)
roles.impartiality: Not applicable -- Employer is a party with commercial interests
roles.delegation: Employer acts through the Engineer for contract administration but retains certain decisions (e.g., termination, major variations)

roles.impartiality: Not applicable -- Contractor is a party with commercial interests

Sub-Clause 3.5 -- fair determination obligation. When making determinations, the Engineer shall consult each Party, endeavour to reach agreement, and make a fair determination. The Engineer is NOT the Employer's agent for determinations.
roles.delegation: Sub-Clause 3.2 -- Engineer may delegate to Engineer's Representative or assistants. Delegation must be in writing. Delegated person has same duty of impartiality for determinations.

key_duties: Duties as delegated by the Engineer in writing
Resident on or near the Site
key_rights: May issue instructions within delegated scope
roles.impartiality: Same obligation as Engineer for delegated determinations
roles.delegation: Cannot further delegate without Engineer's written authority

key_duties: Give decision on referred disputes within 84 days (20.4)
Visit the Site periodically (if standing DAB)
roles.impartiality: DAB members must be independent and impartial. Each member signs a declaration of independence.
roles.delegation: N/A -- DAB acts as a body
